overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza and street. The player moves from an open commercial area with outdoor seating under colorful LED banners, through a covered walkway with green turf, and emerges onto a city street with passing vehicles. The scene features high-rise buildings, elevated highways, and vibrant cyberpunk aesthetics with bright sunlight mixing with artificial neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with outdoor seating under LED banners

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza past orange outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: teal and red commercial building with large CIRCUS signage and ventilation units
overhead curved LED displays showing rainbow patterns spanning the plaza
circular seating arrangement with orange chairs around a central planter
massive concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit futuristic plaza with a teal commercial building on the right displaying 'CIRCUS' signage. Overhead, massive curved LED banners display shifting rainbow colors. The player walks past circular outdoor seating with orange chairs while a pedestrian passes by. The elevated highway structure looms overhead, partially shading the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with green turf

events.description: descends from open plaza into covered area beneath the elevated highway with green ground surface

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past concrete benches and a blue vending machine

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on orange benches against the concrete wall

entered.detail: blue and gray automated vending machine with illuminated display
orange seating benches integrated with concrete planters against the wall
newspapers and debris littering the green carpeted ground

segments.scene_description: The player enters a sheltered walkway beneath the elevated highway where the ground is covered in green turf. A blue vending machine stands on the right while two people sit on benches against the concrete retaining wall. The colorful LED banners continue overhead to the right, and scattered trash litters the ground. The lighting becomes noticeably darker under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial corridor between red building and overpass structure

events.description: enters narrow corridor alongside red commercial building with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow path beside a red commercial building with neon accents

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away from camera down the corridor

entered.detail: angular red and white commercial structure with geometric facade
green neon 'OPEN' sign on the red building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow walkway between a striking red commercial building on the left and the elevated highway structure on the right. The ground changes back to dark paved tiles. A green neon 'OPEN' sign glows on the red building. The player follows a distant pedestrian down the corridor as the colorful LED banners continue overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with pedestrian crossing and vehicle traffic

events.description: emerges from narrow corridor onto open city street with visible traffic
futuristic vehicles drive past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: approaching the street intersection alongside other pedestrians waiting to cross

notable_agents.action: futuristic white and purple car driving along the street

entered.detail: paved urban street with crosswalk markings and traffic
futuristic cars driving along the road including a white sedan
tall gray skyscraper with '06' marking visible on the facade

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor onto a sunlit city street intersection. The colorful LED banners now line the right side at close range. Several pedestrians walk ahead toward the crosswalk while futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. A tall building marked '06' rises in the distance on the left, and the ground shows crosswalk markings as the player approaches the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open commercial plaza through a shaded underpass and finally out onto a bustling city intersection. It begins in a sunlit area beside a teal building with circus signage, moving past orange outdoor seating under massive, rainbow-colored LED banners. As the camera passes beneath the looming elevated highway, the environment shifts into a darker, sheltered walkway featuring green turf, a blue vending machine, and concrete walls. The scene then narrows into a corridor between a striking red building with a glowing green open sign and the highway structure before the path opens up once more. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade back into the sunlight of a city street, where futuristic vehicles drive past and pedestrians gather at a crosswalk beneath the continuing line of vibrant LED banners.
